notes: Passive/fun - picks a random quote and a random prefix (e.g. 'Ted Lasso wants you to know:', 'Coach Lasso reminds you:') and shows them in a full-screen dark overlay. Clicking the overlay dismisses it. Since the quote/prefix are randomized, we check for the common word 'Ted' which appears in every prefix, plus that the overlay is visible.

checks.comment: Overlay with a Ted Lasso quote/prefix should appear
Overlay div should be present in the DOM
